options.responseData: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: $('Build Response').first().json.ok, sql: $('Build Response').first().json.sql, rows: $('Build Response').first().json.rows, explanation: $('Build Response').first().json.explanation, error: $('Build Response').first().json.error || null }) }}

nodes.name: Copilot Query Webhook (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Body: { token, question, panel_context (optional) }. Admin token validated against MARY_MASTER_TOKEN before Claude is called.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 1024, system: 'You are Crystallux DB Query Copilot. Generate ONE PostgreSQL SELECT statement that answers the user\'s question. Rules: (a) SELECT or WITH only — no INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DROP/ALTER; (b) always add LIMIT <= 1000; (c) only use tables from the whitelist: clients, leads, outreach_log, appointment_log, campaigns, scan_errors, admin_action_log, apollo_credits_log, stripe_events_log, niche_overlays, client_onboarding_status; (d) return ONLY a valid JSON object with exactly these keys: {"sql_query": string, "explanation": string, "result_type": "table" | "chart" | "scalar" | "narrative", "chart_hint": "line" | "bar" | "pie" | null, "safety_assessment": "safe" | "unsafe"}. No prose outside the JSON.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Panel context: ' + ($json.panel_context || 'overview') + '\n\nQuestion: ' + $json.question }] }) }}

nodes.name: Claude Generate SQL
nodes.notes: TODO: Bind 'Anthropic API' credential (HTTP Header Auth, header name: x-api-key, value: $ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). No credentials block yet.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ admin_user: 'mary', action_type: 'db_query', input_text: $json.question, panel_context: $json.panel_context || null, generated_content: { sql: $json.sql, explanation: $json.explanation, result_type: $json.result_type }, result_summary: $json.ok ? ('rows=' + (Array.isArray($json.rows) ? $json.rows.length : 0)) : ('error: ' + ($json.error || 'unknown')), success: $json.ok === true, error_message: $json.error || null, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
